items.prompt: compares, orders, locates, and operates on bounded signed rational numbers across fraction and decimal representations
items.expected_evidence: compare and order signed fractions and decimals using reference-point reasoning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves sign and magnitude meaning while ordering or operating on signed rational values.

items.prompt: explains why a signed rational result is reasonable using reference points, direction, and benchmark magnitude
items.expected_evidence: explain why a result makes sense using direction, benchmark, or absolute-size language
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains signed rational reasoning with coherent magnitude and direction structure.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to mixed_form_ordering_breakdown.
items.expected_evidence: locate signed rational values on a number line and interpret distance from zero
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer lost ordering or location meaning across fraction and decimal forms.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, number-line, table, verbal, and simple contextual signed-rational representations
items.expected_evidence: operate fluently on signed rational numbers while preserving sign and magnitude meaning
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves signed rational meaning across multiple representations and contexts.
